name: Caribou Empanadas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Brown the ground caribou meat until fully cooked.
3. Add onions, olives, celery, raisins, jalapeno peppers, vinegar, tomato sauce, and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer the mixture for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and let it cool completely.
7. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Prepare the pie crust pastry according to package instructions or recipe.
9. Cut the pastry into circles large enough to roll around the filling.
10. Place a spoonful of meat mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
11. Fold the pastry over and seal the edges, pricking with a fork to prevent air pockets.
12. Place the empanadas on a greased cookie sheet.
13. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
From: Jim Weller
